judge_result.judge:
@@
A. Freeform text summary of the failure:
After retrieving April-2023 opportunities with contracts (query_db:8), the agent repeatedly failed to compute sales-cycle averages and, stopping early, returned the OwnerId "005Wt000003NJgAIAW" without performing the required turnaround/average calculation, leading to a wrong answer.
B. Failure modes encountered:
FM1: no
FM2: yes
FM3: no
FM4: no
@@

@@
A. Freeform text summary of the failure:
The agent relied on query_db:18, which filtered opportunities by CreatedDate in April 2023 rather than by CompanySignedDate (closings) in April 2023 as required, ignoring the correct cohort indicated by query_db:16 and thus returned "#005Wt000003NEa3IAG" instead of the correct "005Wt000003NDEBIA4".
B. Failure modes encountered:
FM1: no
FM2: yes
FM3: no
FM4: no
@@

@@
A. Freeform text summary of the failure:
The agent limited Opportunity data to 1000 rows without ordering (query_db:0) and then filtered April 2023 in Python (execute_python:20), leading to an incomplete, arbitrarily sampled dataset and thus selecting the wrong agent.
B. Failure modes encountered:
FM1: no
FM2: yes
FM3: no
FM4: no
@@

@@
A. Freeform text summary of the failure:
The agent’s SQL join (query_db:2) directly joined Opportunity.ContractID__c to Contract.Id without normalizing corrupted IDs (e.g., leading “#”), causing valid April-2023 opportunities to be missed and leading execute_python:6 to compute the minimum on an incomplete set and return 005Wt000003NEa3IAG instead of the true 005Wt000003NDEBIA4.
B. Failure modes encountered:
FM1: no
FM2: no
FM3: no
FM4: yes
@@

@@
A. Freeform text summary of the failure:
The agent joined Contract and Opportunity directly on IDs in query_db:5 without normalizing the leading "#" corruption, so execute_python:8 computed averages on an incomplete set of matched opportunities and returned 005Wt000003NEa3IAG instead of the ground-truth agent.
B. Failure modes encountered:
FM1: no
FM2: no
FM3: no
FM4: yes
